last_episode_to_air.overview: The Jedi must stop Taborr's plans on Starlight Beacon.

name: Star Wars: Young Jedi Adventures

next_episode_to_air.name: Heroes and Hot-Shots / A Jedi or a Pirate

overview: Set during the High Republic era and the prime of the Jedi Order, follow Jedi younglings as they study the ways of the Force, explore the galaxy, help citizens and creatures in need, and learn valuable skills needed to become Jedi along the way.

episodes.name: The Young Jedi / Yoda's Mission
episodes.overview: Jedi younglings Kai, Lys, and Nubs go on their first adventure. Yoda gives the younglings a mission.

episodes.name: Nash's Race Day / The Lost Jedi Ship
episodes.overview: Nash's Jedi friends help her compete in a race. The young Jedi find a long-lost Jedi ship.

episodes.name: Get Well Nubs / The Junk Giant
episodes.overview: Kai and Lys seek out a cure for Nubs' illness. The young Jedi set out to catch a thief.

episodes.name: Lys and the Snowy Mountain Rescue / Attack of the Training Droids
episodes.overview: The younglings help wrangle creatures. Kai causes problems when he attempts to program droids to clean the temple.

episodes.name: The Jellyfruit Pursuit / Creature Safari
episodes.overview: Nash and the young Jedi pursue stolen jellyfruit. The younglings discover a bird-like creature.

episodes.name: Squadron / Forest Defenders
episodes.overview: The Jedi put their flying skills to the test. Kai and friends defend the forest creatures' homes.

episodes.name: The Jedi and the Thief / The Missing Kibbin
episodes.overview: Kai and Master Zia must get back her stolen ship. The young Jedi help a bounty hunter find a lost pet.

episodes.name: The Girl and Her Gargantua / The Show Must Go On
episodes.overview: The younglings track an escaped creature. Nash's Jedi friends help reunite her favorite band.

episodes.name: The Princess and the Jedi / Kai's Bad Day
episodes.overview: Nash and the young Jedi transport a princess. Kai's bad day worsens when a simple mission goes awry.

episodes.name: Visitor's Day / The Growing Green Danger
episodes.overview: Jedi track down artifacts stolen from the town fair. Nubs plants a seed that grows out of control.

episodes.name: The Ganguls / Bad Eggs
episodes.overview: Nash's Jedi friends set out to find her missing speeder. Hap's kitchen is overrun by creatures.

episodes.name: Off the Rails / The Thieves of Tharnaka
episodes.overview: Kai and the Jedi must stop Taborr's train heist. The Jedi set out to recover a mysterious artifact.

episodes.name: Tree Troubles / Big Brother's Bounty
episodes.overview: Nubs and the Jedi protect his favorite tree. The Jedi help a young bounty hunter find her brother.

episodes.name: Charhound Chase / Creature Comforts
episodes.overview: Kai helps Bell find his runaway charhound. Lys gets attached to a lost wild creature.

episodes.name: An Adventure with Yoda / The Talon Takeover
episodes.overview: Yoda teams up with the young Jedi to stop pirates. The Jedi must rescue Taborr from the Ganguls.

episodes.name: Mystery of the Opal Cave / Clash
episodes.overview: The young Jedi investigate a haunted cave. Kai and rival Jedi Djovi team up for a mission.

episodes.name: Stuck in the Muck / Junkyard Sleepover
episodes.overview: The Jedi respond to a distress call. The younglings investigate odd noises in the junkyard.

episodes.name: The Great Leaf Glide / The Harvest Feast
episodes.overview: The young Jedi learn how to sky surf. Kai and his friends help a family unite for a feast.

episodes.name: Life Day / Raxlo Strikes Back
episodes.overview: The Jedi help a Wookiee prepare for Life Day. The younglings protect wellagrin eggs from Raxlo.

episodes.name: Aftershock / Feather Frenzy
episodes.overview: Jedi help a prince. Creatures take over Nash's garage.

episodes.name: Best Friends / Happy Trails, Nubs
episodes.overview: Kai and Nubs team up. Nubs is captured by the Ganguls.

episodes.name: The Tale of Short Spire / The Team Up
episodes.overview: Jedi help on Batuu. Taborr and the Jedi work together.

episodes.name: The Caves of Batuu / Finders Keepers
episodes.overview: Kai explores a mystic cave. The Jedi help a scrapper.

episodes.name: The Starship Show / Nash's Super Busy Day
episodes.overview: Draiven steals a ship. Kai offers to help a busy Nash.

episodes.name: The Prince and the Pirate
episodes.overview: The Jedi must stop Taborr's plans on Starlight Beacon.

episodes.name: Heroes and Hot-Shots / A Jedi or a Pirate
The Rustler Roundup / A New Discovery
A Pirate's Pet / The Secret Ship
Nub's Big Mistake / The Jedi Rescue
Terror of Tenoo / The Prince of Masks
Skyring Soaring
episodes.overview: Kai tries to be perfect at flying his Vector through a challenging obstacle course.
